did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a hardware system (SoC) for optical and electrical dual tomographic imaging to aid in skin disease diagnosis. It focuses on the design of the imaging hardware and its performance (7.0fps), but does not mention the use of AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms for image processing, classification, or diagnosis.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
